# langfuse_custom_model (Resource)

Manages a Langfuse custom model definition for cost tracking.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "langfuse_custom_model" "example" {
  model_name    = "my-gpt4"
  match_pattern = "(?i)^my-gpt-4.*"
  unit          = "TOKENS"
  input_price   = 0.00003
  output_price  = 0.00006
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `match_pattern` (String) The regex pattern to match model names.
- `model_name` (String) The name of the custom model.

### Optional

- `input_price` (Number) Price per input token.
- `output_price` (Number) Price per output token.
- `total_price` (Number) Total price per token (alternative to input/output split).
- `unit` (String) The pricing unit, e.g. `TOKENS`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the custom model.
- `is_langfuse_managed` (Boolean) Whether this model is managed by Langfuse (read-only).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import langfuse_custom_model.example <model_id>
```
